codomain_gates.evidence: The export target is m_b(m_b)_MSbar, a short-distance running mass evaluated at its own scale.
codomain_gates.no_smuggling_note: The target definition is imported as a codomain contract only; the PDG value is not used to compute APF_TRACE.

codomain_gates.evidence: APF_TRACE differs from the pole context by -10.042 sigma, rejecting a pole-mass reading.
codomain_gates.no_smuggling_note: Pole context is a negative-control comparison, not a fit input.

codomain_gates.evidence: APF_TRACE is -5.510 MeV from the PDG MSbar self-scale anchor.
codomain_gates.no_smuggling_note: The closeness validates the codomain admission but does not define it by target fitting.

codomain_gates.evidence: The APF value is computed from top TRACE anchor and bottom/top trace ratio; m_b^PDG is comparison only.
codomain_gates.no_smuggling_note: No inverse fit, pole conversion, lattice/sum-rule average, or target mass enters the trace formula.

codomain_gates.evidence: For the specific self-scale object m_b(m_b), no running from a different scale is needed once the codomain is admitted.
codomain_gates.no_smuggling_note: This does not authorize exports to m_b(mu != m_b) or pole/threshold schemes.

codomain_gates.evidence: The current trace bank treats the bottom TRACE anchor as locally exact; comparison uncertainty is carried separately.
codomain_gates.no_smuggling_note: A future APF trace-covariance theorem may broaden this uncertainty; this module does not hide that boundary.

route_branches.note: Closed at export-candidate level by short-distance codomain admission; not physical-final.
Requires QCD anomalous dimension, alpha_s running, thresholds, and covariance.
Pole interpretation is knocked out by the large pole residual and renormalon-sensitive scheme.

export_table.scheme: MSbar self-scale export candidate, m_b(m_b), APF_TRACE codomain-admitted
export_table.note: Candidate value equals APF_TRACE under the admitted self-scale short-distance branch.

export_table.scheme: MSbar running mass at self scale, comparison anchor
export_table.note: PDG listing quotes CL=0.9; used only for validation pull.

export_table.scheme: difference of candidate and comparison anchor

boundary_table.safe_language: The APF bottom trace anchor is admitted as an MSbar self-scale export candidate.
boundary_table.forbidden_language: APF has produced a final physical bottom-mass derivation.

boundary_table.safe_language: No QCD running is required for the self-scale candidate m_b(m_b); running is required for other scales.
boundary_table.forbidden_language: The same value may be used at any renormalization scale.

boundary_table.safe_language: PDG/lattice/sum-rule masses validate the candidate but do not enter the trace computation.
boundary_table.forbidden_language: The few-MeV residual proves the identity theorem by itself.

boundary_table.safe_language: The remaining boundary is publication review of the trace-to-MSbar codomain admission.
boundary_table.forbidden_language: No further reviewer scrutiny is needed.
